title: The Winner Takes It All
why_this_song: The Winner Takes It All by ABBA (1980) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "The winner takes it all"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "The winner takes it all"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Though it's hurting me"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "And someone way down here"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "The loser has to fall"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "takes" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "takes" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "winner" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "winner" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "The Winner Takes It All" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "The Winner Takes It All" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "The Winner Takes It All" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "The Winner Takes It All", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "The Winner Takes It All" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "The Winner Takes It All" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
